title: EU crypto rulebook faces enforcement challenge as MiCA transition ends
summary: Lawyers and industry executives expect EU regulators to enforce MiCA differently as unauthorized crypto companies are required to wind down operations.

title: Canadian Stocks Enjoy Broad Gains After New Pipeline Proposal
summary: Canada’s stocks benchmark climbed Friday morning after Prime Minister Mark Carney unveiled a new pipeline project to the country’s West Coast.

title: OPEC Output Surged in June as Hormuz Flows Jumped, Survey Shows
summary: OPEC’s crude oil production surged last month as Persian Gulf members restored exports through the Strait of Hormuz amid a peace accord between the US and Iran, according to a Bloomberg survey.

title: American Charged in Israel With Spying for Iran in Exchange for Crypto
summary: Israeli prosecutors charged a 21-year-old American man with spying for Iran while studying at a seminary in Jerusalem.

title: Farage Reported to UK Standards Watchdog Over Alleged Crypto Lobbying
